Title: Stat Block Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513087
Version: 3
---

The
Stat Block
component type displays a simple donut chart visualization that represents a single statistic as a percentage. This component can only be created and maintained by ITS administrators. To request the creation of
Stat Block
component on your site, email
support@swarthmore.edu
.
